title: Vibrant Violet Bolsius Rustic Shine Pillar Candle (80 x 68mm)
features: Make every moment special. The natural light of the candles brings a unique warmth and ambience to your home and makes it cosy. Bolsius Vibrant Violet rustic pillar candle has a full height of 8cm and burns for a good 35 hours. The sign of a quality candle is its long burning time and its ability to retain its shape during burning. Bolsius rustic candle does not smoke or drip and has a beautiful rustic finish. With love for people and planets. With natural,
description: Product description About Bolsius Pillar Candles This new rustic candle range from Bolsius is inspired by the colors and textures of nature. Free from palm oil or animal fat, they’re made with a plant based wax and a cotton wick. On top of that, these new renewed rustic candles now burns even longer. With a large flame and soft light, these Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candles bring atmosphere to any environment. Size: 8cm x 6.8cm Fragrance: Unscented Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave unattended. Monitor burn time. Extinguish before leaving the room or going to sleep. Never burn for more than 4 hours at a time. Dispose of candle and container responsibly.
